EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} modified the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to unlock the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} unlocked the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} locked the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to modify the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to lock the user {object.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}
